zh.title: 阿瑟·C·克拉克预言全集 - 科幻巨匠对人类未来的17条预言与验证 | Arthur C. Clarke Predictions
zh.description: 英国科幻作家、未来学家阿瑟·C·克拉克（1917-2008）留下的17条技术预言完整收录，涵盖通信卫星、互联网、平板电脑、太空旅行、人工智能等领域。已应验预言包括地球同步通信卫星、全球信息网络、视频通话等。

en.title: Arthur C. Clarke Predictions - 17 Technology Forecasts from the Sci-Fi Visionary (1917-2008) | Full Archive & Verification
en.description: British science fiction author and futurist Arthur C. Clarke (1917-2008) made 17 remarkable technology predictions covering communication satellites, the internet, tablet computers, space travel, AI, and more. Verified predictions include geostationary satellites, global networks, and video calling.
en.keywords: Arthur C Clarke,Clarke predictions,sci-fi prophecy,communication satellite,space elevator,futurist,technology forecast,2001 Space Odyssey,geostationary orbit
